mission.title: podman-desktop: chore: add release notes to dashboard - main and preload
mission.description:
### What does this PR do?
As part of the dashboard revamp, this PR adds the release notes to the dashboard page. 
This PR is focused on the backend side of the release notes retrieval, and will be followed by https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/pull/9190 (renderer) and https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/pull/9058 ( `version` button in the status bar)

### Screenshot / video of UI

### What issues does this PR fix or reference?

Related to https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/issues/8521

### How to test this PR?

- [x] Tests are covering the bug fix or the new feature

resolution.summary:
Signed-off-by: Sonia Sandler <ssandler@redhat.com>

### What does this PR do?
This PR maps the release notes of each version to a separate JSON file that includes a link to the release image, link to the blog post, title, and summary.
The mapped JSON files will be fetched remotely to be used in https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/pull/8753.
Using this mapping, the link `https://podman-desktop.io/release-notes/<version>.json` will be used to fetch the release notes remotely.
This mapping will be updated every time new release notes are made available.

### Screenshot / video of UI

### What issues does this PR fix or reference?

### How to test this PR?

- [x] Tests are covering the bug fix or the new feature
